subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto them that have attained unto the lights of faith and acknowledged the All-Merciful when He came with a sovereignty that encompassed all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الایمان و اعترف بالرحمن اذ اتی بسلطان احاط من فی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
